name: sailes
description: Sailes app-builder skills — the agentic-first B2B web-app build pipeline.

plugins.name: sailes-app-builder
plugins.description: Sailes app-builder skills — two tracks for custom B2B web apps. BUILD: wayfinder → discovery → bootstrap → design → spec → pre-implement → database → async → hosting → implement. DIAGNOSE: sailes-diagnose, for when a running system is broken rather than missing. Plus sailes-pipedrive and sailes-migrate.
